seoTitle: South Hummocks vs South Kilkerran — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Hummocks and South Kilkerran. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Hummocks vs South Kilkerran: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Hummocks and South Kilkerran.
heading: South Hummocks vs South Kilkerran — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Hummocks, South Australia and South Kilkerran, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Hummocks has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to South Kilkerran (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Hummocks or South Kilkerran safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Hummocks has a flood risk score of 27/100, while South Kilkerran scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Hummocks scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. South Kilkerran scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Hummocks or South Kilkerran?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Hummocks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
